metadata.description: Adversarial security review for AI skills, repos, MCP servers, and packages before you install them.

plugins.name: trust-issues
plugins.description: Adversarial, attacker-minded security review of untrusted code (agent skills, MCP servers, plugins, npm/pip packages) before you install it. A read-only scanner plus a five-persona reasoning pass, ending in a GO / GO-WITH-MITIGATIONS / NO-GO verdict.
